author: vvo
subject: chore(IE8): add Object.freeze sham
body:
Object.freeze is used in various places in our code and is not
polyfilled by polyfill.io (because not doable): https://github.com
/Financial-Times/polyfill-service/issues/232

So we "sham" it, which means that the API is here but it just returns
the object.

IE8 support still waiting for https://github.com/Financial-Times
/polyfill-service/pull/485#issuecomment-145880032
